hero.mainHeadline: Say Goodbye to Chaos, Enjoy Organized Management
hero.mainSubheadline: The first Arabic system designed specifically for Quran memorization circle management
hero.mainDescription: Many academy directors spend long hours tracking administrative details, losing valuable teaching and supervision time. Academiyati was born to carry this burden for you.
hero.headline: Choose Your Next Day
hero.subheadline: Go from a paper manager to a development leader

after.label: Your Day with Academiyati
items: An automated system that never errs

storyJourney.title: A Transformation Story: From Dawn to Dusk

before.title: 22 notifications waiting
before.content: You wake up to notification chaos: a teacher absent, a parent inquiring, a new student wanting to register

before.title: 3 hours wasted
before.content: You calculate invoices manually, arrange the schedule on paper, call those late on payments

before.title: A potential student leaves
before.content: A parent wants to enroll 3 children, but you can't quickly find available slots — they go to your competitor

before.title: You sleep wondering
before.content: Where did my time go? When will I expand? Will I forever be a paper manager?

after.title: One notification
after.content: You wake up to: 'Everything is under control.' The system handled all arrangements overnight

after.title: Planning for expansion
after.content: Instead of routine: you read about education, prepare a workshop for teachers, think about new partnerships

after.title: Registration in 5 minutes
after.content: A parent calls, you send the auto-registration link, booking and payment confirmation done in minutes

after.title: You sleep peacefully
after.content: You know your academy grew 30% this month, and you spent the day as a leader, not a paper manager

problems.title: Managing Your Academy with Excel & WhatsApp… A Daily Nightmare Threatening Your Growth!

items.title: Unprofessional Appearance to Clients
items.description: Relying on manual schedules and random messages reduces parents' and international students' trust in your academy's professionalism.

items.title: The "Student Leakage" Nightmare
items.description: Lack of an internal communication system allows teachers to exchange personal numbers with students, leading to stolen clients and constant revenue loss.

items.title: Scheduling & Management Hell
items.description: Wasting hours every day adjusting timetables, resolving conflicts, and manually informing everyone of changes.

items.title: Lost Payments & Financial Reports
items.description: Difficulty tracking overdue payments and accurately calculating teacher salaries based on actual consumed sessions.

items.title: Scattered Supervisors & Primitive Follow-ups
items.description: Spending time reminding teachers to write reports and sending irregular, exhausting parent updates via WhatsApp.

features.title: One Integrated System… Manages Your Operations & Protects Your Assets

items.title: Student Portal & PWA App
items.description: A cutting-edge, fast web app that allows students and parents to log in, follow schedules, and review reports from any device easily.

items.title: Monitored Internal Communication (Academy Fortress)
items.description: Direct communication between students and teachers only inside the platform, fully supervised and monitored by management, preventing personal number exchanges and eliminating student poaching forever.

items.title: Smart Schedule
items.description: Adapts flexibly to any sudden schedule changes, automatically notifying the teacher, student, and management with zero manual intervention.

items.title: Dedicated Interfaces for All Parties
items.description: An organized work environment with separate, customized interfaces for: academy manager, teacher, and now the student.

items.title: Automated Financial System
items.description: Tracks student payments precisely, calculates teacher salaries instantly based on sessions, and issues comprehensive financial reports (LTV, CAC, Cashflow).

items.title: Smart WhatsApp Communication
items.description: Automatically sends monthly performance reports and important alerts to parents via WhatsApp to ensure maximum satisfaction and commitment.

items.title: Dashboard & Performance Tracking
items.description: One screen gives you a complete view of student attendance rates, teacher commitment, and key performance indicators (KPIs) for your academy.

items.title: Automatic Performance Reports
items.description: An automatic reminder system that prompts teachers to prepare detailed performance reports immediately after sessions to document the student's learning journey with zero administrative effort.

items.title: Direct & Secure Zoom Integration
items.description: Automatically generates session links upon scheduling. Direct links are hidden and appear only as buttons inside the platform to protect your academy's privacy.

ZoomSettings.title: Zoom Settings
ZoomSettings.connectedDescription: Your Zoom account is currently linked. You can unlink it if you wish to connect another account.
ZoomSettings.disconnectedDescription: You haven't linked a Zoom account yet. Connect to automatically create Zoom links for your sessions.
ZoomSettings.helpText: When linked, Zoom meeting links will be automatically generated for new sessions.
ZoomSettings.missing_code: Authorization code not received from Zoom. Please try again.
ZoomSettings.zoom_auth_failed: Failed to exchange token with Zoom. Please verify your app settings and try again.
ZoomSettings.zoom_user_fetch_failed: Account linked but could not retrieve user info from Zoom. Please try again.
ZoomSettings.not_authenticated: Your session has expired. Please log in and try again.
ZoomSettings.not_tutor: Current user is not a tutor. Cannot link Zoom.
ZoomSettings.invalid_state: Security state mismatch. Please try again.
ZoomSettings.unexpected_error: An unexpected error occurred while linking Zoom. Please try again.
